prompt: Expo Go keeps crashing on my Samsung Galaxy before the app even loads

assertions.text: Identifies the Samsung first-load crash as a known issue
Mentions the SDK 53+ splash screen crash on Android 11 and below
Suggests checking/updating the Expo Go version or downloading APK from expo.dev/go
Suggests using adb logcat to get crash logs for diagnosis
Provides a structured troubleshooting sequence (not just a wall of possibilities)
